title: Future Roadmaps: The Path to Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computing
description: Explore the announced development roadmaps from major quantum computing companies. Understand the milestones toward fault-tolerant quantum computing and practical quantum advantage.
learningObjectives: Analyze published roadmaps from IBM, Google, IonQ, and other major players
Understand key milestones on the path to fault-tolerant quantum computing
Evaluate the technical challenges that must be overcome
Assess realistic timelines for quantum advantage in different applications
Identify emerging trends and potential disruptions in quantum hardware
